scheme_name: Free Education for Sports Medal Winners / Participants of National/ International Events
description: The scheme aims to assist medal-winning sportspersons pursuing higher education, encouraging excellence in both sports and academics. Applicable to national and international participants.
eligibility: Applicable to medal winners of national games
Participants in recognized international sporting events
Admitted to universities/institutions as per UGC Act
application_process: Download and fill the application form (Refer Page No. 5)
